_comment: Conservative-scenario projections derived from baseline-metrics.json. See analysis/before-after-model.md for the full derivation. Numbers express monthly impact at the GA Merchandise Store scale; proportional scaling applies for larger accounts.
assumptions: Baseline conversion rate of 1.43 percent puts the account in the signal-starved regime where densification produces measurable Smart Bidding gains.
Tier 1 audience is 20 percent of the scored universe (5644 of 28224) - inside the 5-15 percent target band when expressed against total monthly users.
Average order value held constant at the trailing-month median of $165.58; AOV expansion is not credited to this initiative.
Smart Bidding takes 14 days to fully integrate the densified signal; reported uplift excludes the integration window.
Industry benchmark range for offline-conversion-densified Smart Bidding: 5-18 percent CPA reduction. Conservative scenario uses the lower bound (8 percent).
USD to SEK conversion at 10.5 SEK per USD; FX volatility absorbed into the conservative buffer.
Recurring infrastructure cost is dominated by BigQuery on-demand pricing; storage and Cloud Run are negligible at this scale.
No incremental media spend; uplift is held to be efficiency-only on the existing budget.
Build estimate of ~80 engineering hours at SEK 1500/hr (SEK 120,000) plus ~10 maintenance hours/month at SEK 15,000 yields payback inside two months at this account size.
